title: Plantar Pressure Mapping for Early Diabetic Neuropathy Detection
abstract: A machine learning approach to detecting early diabetic neuropathy through plantar pressure distribution analysis, validated against clinical assessment protocols at Bharati Hospital, Pune.

title: Physiological Deterioration Early Warning System Using Multivariate Time-Series
abstract: An ensemble-based early warning system for detecting physiological deterioration in ICU patients using multivariate vital sign time-series data.

title: Opportunistic Osteoporosis Screening from Routine Chest X-rays
abstract: A convolutional neural network pipeline for detecting osteoporotic bone density loss from routine chest radiographs, enabling opportunistic screening without dedicated DXA scans.

title: Federated Learning in Indian Hospital Networks: Architecture and Privacy Guarantees
abstract: An overview of Aescode's federated learning infrastructure — how model weights, not patient data, move between hospital nodes and central aggregation servers.
